headline: ACN Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates on Growth in Managed Services
summary: Accenture's Q3 earnings beat estimates as managed services' revenues grow, margins improve and cash flow remains strong.

raw.headline: ACN Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates on Growth in Managed Services
raw.summary: Accenture's Q3 earnings beat estimates as managed services' revenues grow, margins improve and cash flow remains strong.

headline: Corpay (CPAY): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Corpay trades at $353.00 per share and has stayed right on track with the overall market, gaining 15.3% over the last six months. At the same time, the S&P 500 has returned 10.9%.
